audit_items.proof_trace: This is an EVM execution library responsible for transaction execution within blocks, not consensus-layer block header validation. The parent_hash field is used only for EIP-2935 system calls (storing block hashes for BLOCKHASH opcode access), not for validating the hash matches keccak256(rlp(parent_header)). Header validation occurs in consensus clients (Prysm, Lighthouse, etc.), which are outside this codebase's scope.
